expo.name: Atlas
expo.description: Atlas is your personal bucket list and adventure tracker. Dream it, plan it, live it. Track goals, explore a world map of dreams, and celebrate completions with photos and memories.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Atlas uses your location to show you nearby goals on the map and display local weather.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Atlas uses your location to show you nearby goals on the map and display local weather.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Atlas needs camera access to capture photos for your goals.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Atlas needs photo library access to add images to your goals.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Atlas needs permission to save photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Atlas uses your location to show nearby goals and local weather.

plugins.photosPermission: Atlas needs access to your photos to add images to your goals.
plugins.cameraPermission: Atlas needs camera access to capture photos for your goals.
